knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.title: Control Matter from KNX
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.no_devices: No Matter devices found. Check the Matter controller and click refresh.
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.door_lock_pin_required: This lock reports that a PIN is required for remote operation.
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.door_lock_commands_missing: This endpoint does not advertise both lock and unlock commands. Missing commands will be rejected.
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.locate_started: Locate mode started. Press again to stop (auto-stops after 10 minutes).
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.override_set_day_fast_this: Switch to DAY mode by rapid switching the light off then on (this light only)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.override_set_day_fast_all: Switch to DAY mode by rapid switching the light off then on (apply to ALL light nodes)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.knx_brightness_onhueoff: When the Matter light is Off send 0%. When it is On, restore the previous value (default KNX behaviour)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.update_local_state_from_knx_write: Update local cached Matter state from KNX bus writes
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.update_local_state_from_knx_write_hint: Enabled: faster local reactions and consistent immediate KNX read responses. Disabled: keep the cache aligned only with real Matter reports.
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.use_min_brightness: Use minimum brightness specified for the Matter light
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_2200: (start of Philips White Ambiance lights range)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_2700: (warm white, intimate, cozy, personal, for living rooms)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_3000: (soft white, warm, calming, for bathrooms and kitchens)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_3500_day: (neutral white, balanced, friendly, inviting, for office spaces and retail)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_3500_night: (not recommended for night time - neutral white, for office spaces and retail)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_4100_day: (cool white, precise, clean, focused, for garages and grocery stores)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_4100_night: (not recommended for night time - cool white, precise, clean, focused, for garages and grocery stores)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_5000_day: (bright white, vibrant, crisp, for warehouses, sports stadiums and healthcare)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_5000_night: (not recommended for night time - bright white, vibrant, crisp, for warehouses, sports stadiums and healthcare)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.temp_desc_6500_night: (not recommended for night time - daylight, alert, energetic, for indoor agriculture)
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.effect_tip: Provide KNX value / Matter effect pairs. When the incoming KNX payload matches the value, the selected effect is applied to the light.
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.effect_tip_status: If a status group address is configured, the current Matter effect is emitted using the mapped KNX value or the effect name.
knxUltimateMatterControllerDevice.effect_not_supported: This light does not expose Matter effects.
